overall.description: A slow aerial pan across a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night, showcasing towering skyscrapers illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and atmospheric haze. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 features the dense urban architecture of Night City with dramatic artificial lighting and a continuous leftward camera movement revealing different districts of the metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of downtown corporate district

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the city skyline from a high aerial vantage point, surveying the illuminated urban landscape

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated '02' signage near the top, visible against the night sky
very tall skyscraper with distinctive pink and cyan neon lighting at the crown
cluster of illuminated glass office buildings with grid-patterned window lights

segments.scene_description: Opening aerial view of the cyberpunk city at night, establishing the dense urban environment with the '02' building prominent on the left and a tall skyscraper with pink neon crown on the right. The camera slowly pans left across the hazy skyline, revealing the illuminated windows of the corporate district while maintaining a smooth, stabilized aerial perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of commercial district with large advertising displays

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward aerial pan as new architectural features enter the field of view

entered.detail: squat cube-shaped building wrapped in large bright orange and yellow digital advertisements
pair of matching skyscrapers with large vertical red advertisement banners displaying product images

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its leftward pan as a distinctive cube-shaped building wrapped in bright orange advertisements enters from the right and moves toward the center. The '02' building and pink-crowned skyscraper gradually exit the left side of the frame, while two tall towers with matching red billboards begin to emerge on the right horizon, marking a transition to a more commercial advertising district.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of downtown with twin advertising towers

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep across the city center, focusing on the prominent twin towers

entered.detail: additional modern glass skyscrapers with varied lighting patterns entering from the right

segments.scene_description: The pan continues with the twin red billboard towers becoming the dominant central feature, displaying matching vertical advertisements with product imagery and pricing. The cube building exits toward the left as the camera reveals more of the city's dense skyline, with various illuminated high-rises and neon signage filling the background under the hazy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan across a dense cyberpunk skyline that shifts from a corporate district toward a vibrant commercial advertising hub. It begins with a view of the hazy night city, centering on the prominent 02 building and a skyscraper topped with a pink neon crown. As the camera glides leftward, these structures exit the frame to make room for a cube-shaped building wrapped in bright orange advertisements that slides into the center of the view. The scene then expands to reveal two towering skyscrapers with matching red billboards emerging on the horizon, which gradually become the dominant central feature. Finally, the camera continues its smooth trajectory, leaving the cube building behind to showcase a vast expanse of illuminated high-rises and neon signage under the atmospheric glow of the metropolis.
